flight_summary.definition:
SELECT flight_no,
    departure_airport,
    arrival_airport,
    scheduled_departure
   FROM postgres_air.flight;

passenger_details.definition:
SELECT p.first_name,
    p.last_name,
    b.booking_ref
   FROM postgres_air.passenger p
     JOIN postgres_air.booking b ON p.booking_id = b.booking_id;
